title: Ozark Mountain UFO Conference draws cryptozoology fans to Eureka Springs
description: EUREKA SPRINGS -- There is something suspicious in the woods near Mena, said Alan Megargle, a filmmaker and Bigfoot investigator who attended the 38th annual Ozark Mountain UFO Conference in Eureka Springs on Friday.

title: Trump orders release of government alien and UFO files after Obama comments
description: President Donald Trump says he's ordering release of alien and UFO files after Barack Obama's comments sparked renewed interest.

title: UFO Conference comes to Fredericton
description: Hundreds of people packed into the Maritime Forestry Complex auditorium Saturday to learn more about the inexplicable things they’ve seen in the night sky.
